zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft於1341年6月11日出生在英國素福爾可內特萊斯亞德時，他的父親Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead27歲，母親Margaret Badlesmere26歲。他於1348年6月5日之前與Margaret Deincourt在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是5個女兒的父母。他去世於1372年4月13日在英國素福爾可登維其享年30歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可登維其格也福利亞斯 普利奧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft于1341年6月11日出生在英国素福爾可內特萊斯亞德时，他的父亲Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead27岁，母亲Margaret Badlesmere26岁。他于1348年6月5日之前与Margaret Deincourt在英国倫敦结婚。他们至少是5个女儿的父母。他去世于1372年4月13日在英国素福爾可登維其享年30岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可登維其格也福利亞斯 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft was born on 11 June 1341, in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England, his father, Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead, was 27 and his mother, Margaret Badlesmere, was 26. He married Margaret Deincourt before 5 June 1348, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 5 daughters. He died on 13 April 1372, in Dunwich, Suffolk, England, at the age of 30, and was buried in Greyfriars Priory, Dunwich, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft est né le 11 juin 1341, à Nettlestead, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margaret Badlesmere, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Deincourt avant 5 juin 1348, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 filles. Il est décédé le 13 avril 1372, à Dunwich, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterré à Greyfriars Priory, Dunwich, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft am 11. Juni 1341 in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead 27 und seine Mutter Margaret Badlesmere 26. Er hat vor 5. Juni 1348 in London, England Margaret Deincourt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Töchter. Er starb am 13. April 1372 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Dunwich, Suffolk, England und wurde in Greyfriars Priory, Dunwich, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft è nato il il 11 giugno 1341 nel Nettlestead, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Badlesmere, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Deincourt prima del 5 giugno 1348, nel London, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figlie. Morì il 13 aprile 1372, nel Dunwich, Suffolk, England, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolto a Greyfriars Priory, Dunwich, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoftが1341年6月11日にイギリススフォルクネットレステアドで生まれた時，父Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlesteadは27歳，母Margaret Badlesmereは26歳であった。1348年6月5日以前にイギリスロンドンでMargaret Deincourtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の娘の親であった。彼は1372年4月13日にイギリススフォルクダンウィチで30歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクダンウィチグレイフリアルズ プリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft(이)가 1341년 6월 11일 영국 수폴크 네틀레스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Badlesmere(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1348년 6월 5일 이전 영국 런던에서 Margaret Deincourt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1372년 4월 13일 영국 수폴크 던위치에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 던위치 그리프리아르스 플리오리에 묻혔다.

pt.11 June 1341–13 April 1372: 11 de junho de 1341–13 de abril de 1372
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft nasceu em 11 de junho de 1341, em Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Badlesmere, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Deincourt antes 5 de junho de 1348, em London, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de abril de 1372, em Dunwich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 30 anos, e foi sepultado em Greyfriars Priory, Dunwich, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft родился 11 июня 1341 г. в местности неттлестид, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Badlesmere, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Deincourt перед 5 июнь 1348 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 дочерей. Он умер 13 апреля 1372 г. в местности дунвич, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 30 лет и был похоронен в местности грифрярс приори, дунвич, суффолк, Англия.

sm.from 1344 to 1347: mai le 1344 e o'o I le 1347

es.11 June 1341–13 April 1372: 11 de junio de 1341–13 de abril de 1372
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft nació el 11 de junio de 1341, en Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Margaret Badlesmere, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Margaret Deincourt antes de 5 de junio de 1348, en London, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijas. Murió el 13 de abril de 1372, en Dunwich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 30 años, y fue sepultado en Greyfriars Priory, Dunwich, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
